query: INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, videoUrl, readingMaterial, assignment, lessonOrder) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Cells and Organisms', 'Explore cell structure, function, and how cells form organisms.', 'https://example.com/video/cells', 'Cells Guide', 'Diagram cells and explain functions', 9), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Heredity and Evolution', 'Learn about genetics, inheritance, and evolution.', 'https://example.com/video/heredity', 'Heredity Reference', 'Analyze genetic concepts', 10), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Ecosystems and Biodiversity', 'Study ecosystems, food webs, and biodiversity.', 'https://example.com/video/ecosystems', 'Ecosystems Guide', 'Analyze ecosystem relationships', 11), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Chemical Reactions', 'Master chemical reactions, bonding, and stoichiometry.', 'https://example.com/video/chemistry', 'Chemistry Reference', 'Balance equations', 12), ((SELECT id FROM courses WHERE code = 'GED-SCI'), 'Waves and Sound', 'Explore wave properties, sound, and light.', 'https://example.com/video/waves', 'Waves Guide', 'Analyze wave properties', 13);
